---
title: "post_template"
author:
  - name: Felix G.
    affiliation: University of Kansas - Class
    
date: 2026-04-26
date-modified: 2025-05-05
image: "image.jpg"

categories: [methods]
# categories - Choose one per post
#   - research
#   - methods
#   - learning
#   - commentary
#   - notes

tags: [R, regression, diagnostics]
# tags - Choose many representative tags
#   - Tools/Software
#     R, Tidyverse, fixest, data.table, caret, ltertools, glmnet
#   - Methods/Techniques
#     regression, panel-data, ML, clustering, classification, inference
#   - Data/Domain
#     education, labor-markets, survey-data, public-health
#   - Workflow/Practice
#     reproducibility, data-engineering, data-cleaning, data-harmonization,
#     pipelines, data-viz

freeze: auto
draft: true
embed-resources: true
---
